name: Unum Group 6.250% Junior Subordinated Notes due 2058
summary: Unum Group 6.250% Junior Subordinated Notes due 2058 represent debt issued by Unum Group, a provider of financial protection benefits in the United States and the United Kingdom. These notes are subordinated to Unum Group's senior debt and pay a fixed interest rate until maturity. Unum Group is headquartered in Chattanooga, Tennessee.
